---
title: "collision_investigator.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/collision_investigator.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.47
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 4.31
overall_score: 3.88
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating CollisionInvestigator, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import CollisionInvestigator and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 23 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `CollisionInvestigator`
- `execute`
